summary: Full backend + frontend verification of /books (Books, Catalogues & Publications). Backend: 13/13 pytest tests pass — added test_create_inquiry_books_types asserting POST /api/inquiries accepts 'purchase', 'signed_copy', 'research' returning 201 with correct echo (country, consent), and extended test_create_inquiry_all_valid_types to cover all 8 InquiryType literals (general, collector, gallery_curator, press, institutional, purchase, signed_copy, research). Existing inquiry types, invalid email→422, invalid inquiry_type→422, prints optional fields, newsletter idempotency, projects list/detail all still green. Frontend (Playwright): 67/67 static assertions pass — document.title='Books and Publications | Kobi Israel', root data-testid='books-page', hero (books-hero-title='Books', subtitle, intro, cta-view→#books-index, cta-inquire→#books-inquiry), editorial heading='Books as Portable Archives', books-index-heading='Publications' with all 10 publication card slugs present (cuba-love-story, fragments-of-life, river-of-three-crossings, intimate-strangers, a-chaos-of-appearances, artist-catalogues, exhibition-catalogues, pdf-archive, upcoming-publications, selected-essays-and-texts), featured heading='Cuba, Love Story' with related project link to /projects/cuba-love-story, purchase heading='Purchase and Availability', pdf heading='PDF Archive and Digital Publications' with all 7 PDF cards + CTAs (artist-statement, selected-essays, exhibition-catalogues, project-notes, press-pdfs, book-samples, archive-texts), texts heading='Texts, Essays and Notes' with all 10 text cards (memory, masculinity, desire, exile, photography, moving-images, autobiography, travel, queer-codes, archive-notes), history heading='Publication History', inquiry form with all 9 testids and the select having exactly 7 options matching {purchase, signed_copy, collector, research, press, institutional, general}, related heading='Related Archive' with all 7 links (still, moving, projects, prints, archive, cv, contact). Interaction: 18/18 pass — clicking books-card-inquire-cuba-love-story prefills book='Cuba, Love Story'+type='purchase'; books-featured-request prefills both; books-featured-collector flips type→'collector'; books-purchase-request-cta sets type='purchase'; books-pdf-cta-artist-statement sets type='research'+book='Artist Statement PDF'; submit without consent fires sonner toast AND does NOT POST to /api/inquiries (verified via request listener, posted=0); submit with consent posts exactly once, books-inquiry-success appears with 'Thank you for your inquiry' text; nav-link-books navigates to /books. Regression: /still grid has 12 cards, /moving grid has 12 cards (corrected selector — initial loose prefix match counted card-cta too), /prints loads with 10 collections, /projects/cuba-love-story returns 200, /nonexistent shows 'Project not found' 404. Mobile 390px: hero title 342px wide, publication card 342px (stacks single column), form name+email fields stack at 342px, consent checkbox 13x16px readable.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py InquiryType Literal cleanly extended with purchase/signed_copy/research; Pydantic correctly rejects unknown values with 422. No model migration concerns since inquiries are append-only and inquiry_type is a free-form string in MongoDB.

Books.jsx (102 lines) is well-decomposed — 10 section components + reusable forwardRef BooksInquiryForm exposing setInquiryType + setBookInterest. Single responsibility per child component; no duplicated logic.
Form consent guard short-circuits BEFORE the network call (verified: 0 POSTs without consent vs 1 POST with consent). Correct UX + saves a wasted round-trip.

All 10 publication card 'View' links route to /projects/{slug}; only cuba-love-story has a guaranteed backend project (verified 200). Other slugs (fragments-of-life, river-of-three-crossings, intimate-strangers exist in SELECTED_PROJECTS too) — but a-chaos-of-appearances, artist-catalogues, exhibition-catalogues, pdf-archive, upcoming-publications, selected-essays-and-texts likely render the 'Project not found' fallback. The fallback page is graceful (returns 200 with 'Project not found' content + 3 nav CTAs) so this is acceptable for placeholder phase. Worth confirming with E1 whether non-publication slugs should suppress the 'View' link or route to an /books/{slug} detail using the exported PublicationDetail.jsx template (currently unwired).

PublicationDetail.jsx exists in components/publication/ but is not wired to a route this iteration. Confirmed via App.js inspection no /books/:slug route. Acceptable per agent_to_agent_context_note — exported for future use.
BookInquiry select has exactly 7 options matching BOOK_INQUIRY_TYPE_OPTIONS; values align with backend InquiryType literal so any submission round-trips cleanly.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (added test_create_inquiry_books_types covering purchase/signed_copy/research; extended test_create_inquiry_all_valid_types to all 8 literals)
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed inquiry records via API for 8 InquiryType literals incl. purchase/signed_copy/research, plus TEST_BooksUser via UI submit, plus TEST_NoConsent attempt blocked client-side. All persist in db.inquiries; collection append-only, no cleanup required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: /books page is fully built and integrated. Backend InquiryCreate now accepts 8 inquiry_types: general, collector, gallery_curator, press, institutional, purchase, signed_copy, research. BooksInquiryForm ref API: formRef.current.setInquiryType(type) + formRef.current.setBookInterest(book). Sonner toasts use [data-sonner-toast] selector. All 10 publication slugs, 7 PDF slugs, 10 text slugs, 7 related links rendered with stable data-testid registry in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/home.js#BOOKS. PublicationDetail.jsx (reusable template) exists at components/publication/ but is NOT wired to any route — flag if future iteration adds /books/:slug. NOTE: publication card 'View' links route to /projects/{slug}; only 4 of 10 slugs (cuba-love-story, fragments-of-life, river-of-three-crossings, intimate-strangers) have matching backend projects; the other 6 render the graceful 'Project not found' page. If E1 wires PublicationDetail in a future iteration, retest those 6 slugs.
rca of the issue: n/a — no functional defects found across backend or frontend. All MVP acceptance criteria for the /books page verified passing.
